description: Pupil hits volatility only — expect 1 mark, volatility hit, CPU-use missed.

part.raw_answer: RAM is volatile so it loses all its data when you turn off the computer.

markPoints.text: Volatile — loses contents when power is removed
accepted_alternatives: loses its data when switched off

markPoints.text: Stores data/instructions currently in use by the CPU

questionStem: A computer has RAM and a hard disk.
modelAnswer: RAM is volatile and stores data and instructions the CPU is currently using.
